subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest toward God! The distinguished namesake was faithful to his promise, and therefore attained unto this most exalted station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر الی الله سمی بزرگوار صادق الوعد امین بود لهذا باین مقام بلند اعلی در
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @martyrs and martyrdom
